ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pathways" (
  "pathway_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each pathway (e.g., hsa04978) */,
  "pathway_name" TEXT /* Name of the pathway (e.g., Mineral absorption) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pathway */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the pathway (e.g., signal transduction, metabolic) */,
  "source_database" TEXT /* The database from which the pathway information is sourced (e.g., KEGG, Reactome) */,
  "version" TEXT /* The version of the pathway data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date when the pathway data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each gene (e.g., MT1E) */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* The chromosome where the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* The start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* The end position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* The strand of the DNA on which the gene is located (e.g., +, -) */,
  "gene_type" TEXT /* The type of gene (e.g., protein-coding, non-coding) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathway_enrichment" (
  "enrichment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrichment result */,
  "pathway_id" TEXT /* ID of the pathway being enriched */,
  "term" TEXT /* Term being enriched (e.g., MT1E, MT1F, MT1G, MT1X, MT2A) */,
  "fold_enrichment" REAL /* Fold enrichment of the pathway */,
  "occurrence" INTEGER /* Number of genes in the pathway */,
  "support" REAL /* Support for the enrichment result */,
  "lowest_p" REAL /* Lowest p-value for the enrichment result */,
  "highest_p" REAL /* Highest p-value for the enrichment result */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* The date when the enrichment analysis was performed */,
  "dataset_id" TEXT /* The ID of the dataset used for the enrichment analysis */,
  "method" TEXT /* The method used for the enrichment analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrichment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pathway_enrichment_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES pathways ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_pathway_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene associated with the pathway */,
  "pathway_id" TEXT /* ID of the pathway associated with the gene */,
  "association_type" TEXT /* The type of association (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_pathway_associations_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES pathways ("pathway_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_pathway_associations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulation" (
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulation */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene being regulated */,
  "regulation_type" TEXT /* Type of regulation (e.g., up-regulated, down-regulated) */,
  "pathway_id" TEXT /* ID of the pathway involved in the regulation */,
  "regulation_strength" TEXT /* The strength of the regulation (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "regulation_evidence" TEXT /* Evidence supporting the regulation (e.g., experimental, computational) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulation_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulation_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES pathways ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* The institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department within the institution */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* The user's contact number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workspaces" (
  "workspace_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workspace */,
  "workspace_name" TEXT /* Name of the workspace */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workspace */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the workspace */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date when the workspace was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date when the workspace was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workspace_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workspaces_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workspace_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "workspace_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workspace the member belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member */,
  "role_in_workspace" TEXT /* The role of the user within the workspace (e.g., admin, member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workspace_members_workspace_id FOREIGN KEY ("workspace_id") REFERENCES workspaces ("workspace_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workspace_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_sets" (
  "gene_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene set */,
  "gene_set_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene set */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date when the gene set was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date when the gene set was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_set_genes" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "gene_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene set the gene belongs to */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene */,
  "association_type" TEXT /* The type of association between the gene and the gene set (e.g., direct, inferred) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_set_genes_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_set_genes_gene_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_set_id") REFERENCES gene_sets ("gene_set_id")
)
